tools.name: ae.check_availability
tools.description: Check After Effects render-provider availability for aerender and nexrender.

tools.name: ae.collect_render_evidence
tools.description: Write render status and output evidence for an After Effects render without claiming live execution unless output is readable.

tools.name: ae.create_render_plan
tools.description: Create an artifact-first After Effects render plan without enabling raw JSX by default.

tools.name: ae.prepare_file_bridge
tools.description: Write an After Effects file-bridge plan for approved render runners and status collection.

tools.name: ae.prepare_render_execution
tools.description: Write a bounded After Effects render execution plan for an approved external runner without executing commands.

tools.name: ae.prepare_template_replacements
tools.description: Write typed After Effects template text/media replacement operations without exposing raw JSX.

tools.name: ae.queue_aerender
tools.description: Queue an aerender command manifest for approval-controlled render execution.

tools.name: ae.queue_nexrender
tools.description: Queue a nexrender job manifest for approval-controlled template rendering.

tools.name: ae.render_frame_preview
tools.description: Write a frame preview render plan for a single After Effects frame.

tools.name: ae.run_motion_qc
tools.description: Run motion render QC checks against an After Effects render plan.

tools.name: asset.acquire_asset
tools.description: Acquire a selected local/user asset into artifact storage or write a remote acquisition manifest with provenance and license records.

tools.name: asset.acquire_or_generate
tools.description: Macro tool that resolves candidates and selects an existing asset when possible, otherwise writes a fal fallback request under the selected policy.

tools.name: asset.evaluate_license_policy
tools.description: Normalize asset license metadata and write commercial-use, attribution, review, and postprocess requirements.

tools.name: asset.finalize_asset
tools.description: Write final asset package manifest and require final Blender QC evidence before delivery.

tools.name: asset.generate_3d
tools.description: Write or submit a fal 3D generation request with server-side FAL_KEY guardrails.

tools.name: asset.ingest_generated_result
tools.description: Extract generated model, preview, and texture URLs from a fal-style result and optionally download generated outputs into artifact storage.

tools.name: asset.postprocess_generated_asset
tools.description: Write generated-asset postprocess plan for smart topology, glTF optimization, and final Blender QC.

tools.name: asset.resolve_source_plan
tools.description: Classify asset intent and write a source priority plan across local cache, Poly Haven, Sketchfab, manual Fab URLs, and fal fallback generation.

tools.name: asset.search_candidates
tools.description: Write scored asset candidates using the source policy. Remote providers are represented as provenance-safe candidates unless explicit acquisition is enabled.

tools.name: asset.write_asset_sbom
tools.description: Write an asset package SBOM with checksums, license policy, provenance paths, and final QC requirements.

tools.name: asset.write_provenance
tools.description: Write a standalone provenance and license manifest for an acquired or generated asset.

tools.name: blender.apply_material
tools.description: Create a material-application manifest for MaterialX or Blender material adapters.

tools.name: blender.await_bridge_status
tools.description: Poll Blender bridge status files until a matching command status is available.

tools.name: blender.configure_engine_profile
tools.description: Create a target engine profile for Roblox, Unity, Unreal, or WebGL asset budgets.

tools.name: blender.create_asset
tools.description: Alias-style manifest for creating a Blender asset through the external bridge.

tools.name: blender.create_game_asset
tools.description: Create a production job manifest for an external Blender bridge to generate a game asset.

tools.name: blender.create_material_pack
tools.description: Create a material-pack manifest for MaterialX/OpenImageIO/OpenColorIO-capable adapters.

tools.name: blender.create_materialx_workflow
tools.description: Create a MaterialX and OCIO/ACES lookdev workflow manifest.

tools.name: blender.create_scene
tools.description: Create a scene-generation manifest for an external Blender bridge.

tools.name: blender.create_usd_pipeline
tools.description: Create a USD pipeline manifest for v2 asset exchange workflows.

tools.name: blender.export_game_ready
tools.description: Export a game-ready artifact copy and QC report.

tools.name: blender.external_adapter_health
tools.description: Check the opt-in external Blender MCP adapter without exposing its raw tool surface.

tools.name: blender.external_apply_transform
tools.description: Apply a bounded transform through an opt-in external Blender MCP adapter, then rerun local QC where supported.

tools.name: blender.external_export_asset
tools.description: Export an asset through an opt-in external Blender MCP adapter, then rerun local QC where supported.

tools.name: blender.external_import_asset
tools.description: Import an asset through an opt-in external Blender MCP adapter, with request/response artifact capture and local source QC.

tools.name: blender.external_render_preview
tools.description: Render a preview through an opt-in external Blender MCP adapter, with artifact capture and local source QC.

tools.name: blender.external_validate_scene
tools.description: Validate a scene through an opt-in external Blender MCP adapter and capture the normalized response artifact.

tools.name: blender.fix_asset_issues
tools.description: Create a repair plan from an asset QC report.

tools.name: blender.inspect_scene
tools.description: Inspect a .glb/.gltf asset or report that external Blender is required for .blend.

tools.name: blender.modify_asset
tools.description: Create a non-destructive modification manifest for an existing asset.

tools.name: blender.optimize_asset
tools.description: Create an optimized artifact slot; copies source when external glTF optimizer is unavailable.

tools.name: blender.plan_rig_animation
tools.description: Create an advanced rig/animation plan without executing raw Blender scripts.

tools.name: blender.read_bridge_status
tools.description: Read Blender bridge status JSON files produced by a trusted bridge adapter.

tools.name: blender.render_preview
tools.description: Create a deterministic placeholder preview unless an external Blender renderer is configured.

tools.name: blender.repair_basic_asset
tools.description: Run a template-based Blender repair pass for scale, normals, triangulation, and GLB export.

tools.name: blender.validate_asset
tools.description: Write a standardized asset QC report for a .glb/.gltf/.blend target.

tools.name: capcut.check_availability
tools.description: Check optional CapCut provider backends without proxying raw app APIs.

tools.name: capcut.create_draft_plan
tools.description: Create a copy-on-write CapCut social draft plan for human-approved execution.

tools.name: capcut.create_social_draft
tools.description: Create a CapCut social-video draft plan, manifest, and QC report in one artifact-first macro.

tools.name: capcut.export_draft_package
tools.description: Write a copy-on-write CapCut draft package manifest for a human or approved runner to import.

tools.name: capcut.resolve_adapter
tools.description: Resolve a bounded optional CapCut backend without exposing raw cloud, GUI, or draft APIs.

tools.name: capcut.run_delivery_qc
tools.description: Write CapCut delivery QC connected to the same FFmpeg-style delivery gates used for video exports.

tools.name: capcut.run_draft_qc
tools.description: Run policy and delivery checks on a CapCut draft plan or manifest.

tools.name: capcut.write_draft_manifest
tools.description: Write a CapCut draft manifest that records source media and copy-on-write safety constraints.

tools.name: core.health
tools.description: Return server health and artifact root.

tools.name: core.license_manifest
tools.description: Return direct, optional external, and reference-only dependency license posture.

tools.name: director.build_roblox_feature
tools.description: Create a Roblox feature build plan focused on read-only inspection, Luau QC, and command manifests.

tools.name: director.create_motion_package
tools.description: Create an After Effects/Blender motion package plan with render QC gates.

tools.name: director.create_roblox_trailer
tools.description: Create a Roblox trailer plan that combines Roblox project QC with video-provider delivery.

tools.name: director.create_social_video
tools.description: Create a provider-aware social video plan with Premiere first and CapCut fallback.

tools.name: director.full_production_report
tools.description: Create a full production report linking asset, edit, QC, approval, and license artifacts.

tools.name: director.handoff_blender_asset
tools.description: Create an asset manifest for Blender to Premiere handoff.

tools.name: director.multi_agent_review
tools.description: Create a multi-agent review checklist for asset, edit, audio, captions, safety, and licensing.

tools.name: director.plan_production
tools.description: Create a full Blender-to-Premiere production plan with QC gates.

tools.name: premiere.add_marker
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to add a sequence marker.

tools.name: premiere.add_transition
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to add a transition to a targeted edit point.

tools.name: premiere.apply_audio_preset
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to apply an audio preset to a targeted clip.

tools.name: premiere.apply_brand_package
tools.description: Queue a brand package application command for captions, colors, fonts, and graphics.

tools.name: premiere.apply_effect_preset
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to apply a bounded effect preset to a targeted clip.

tools.name: premiere.apply_lumetri_preset
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to apply a Lumetri preset or look to a targeted clip.

tools.name: premiere.apply_timeline_markers
tools.description: Queue safe-margin, intro, outro, and chapter marker metadata for a Premiere sequence.

tools.name: premiere.auto_caption
tools.description: Create an SRT caption file from supplied transcript text, or a placeholder when ASR is not configured.

tools.name: premiere.await_cep_status
tools.description: Poll Premiere CEP status files until a matching command status is available.

tools.name: premiere.build_project_delivery
tools.description: Build a project-specific timeline, brand, and export delivery plan, then queue CEP commands.

tools.name: premiere.build_timeline_from_otio
tools.description: Queue a Premiere CEP command to build a timeline from an OTIO plan.

tools.name: premiere.cleanup_subtitles
tools.description: Normalize SRT/VTT captions, remove empty cues, repair overlaps, and wrap long lines.

tools.name: premiere.create_caption_track
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to create or attach a caption track from a subtitle file.

tools.name: premiere.create_multilanguage_subtitles
tools.description: Create subtitle translation job manifests for multiple languages.

tools.name: premiere.create_sequence
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to create a sequence without exposing raw ExtendScript.

tools.name: premiere.describe_subtitle_artifacts
tools.description: Write the multilingual subtitle artifact schema and expected language outputs.

tools.name: premiere.detect_scenes
tools.description: Run PySceneDetect when available, otherwise write a scene detection adapter manifest.

tools.name: premiere.export_social_variants
tools.description: Create multi-platform export profile manifests for vertical, square, and horizontal delivery.

tools.name: premiere.export_video
tools.description: Create an export plan; real Premiere export requires the external CEP bridge and approval.

tools.name: premiere.export_with_preset
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to export the active sequence with a named preset.

tools.name: premiere.finalize_export_qc
tools.description: Resolve an export CEP status and run delivery QC when the exported file exists.

tools.name: premiere.fix_qc_issues
tools.description: Create a remediation plan for failed or warning delivery QC checks.

tools.name: premiere.generate_thumbnail_plan
tools.description: Create an automated thumbnail generation plan from the edit and brand package.

tools.name: premiere.import_media_once
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to import media only when it is not already in the project.

tools.name: premiere.index_media
tools.description: Index media with ffprobe metadata when available.

tools.name: premiere.ingest_media
tools.description: Copy media into the artifact store and write an ingest manifest.

tools.name: premiere.insert_clip_at_time
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to insert media at a timeline time.

tools.name: premiere.make_rough_cut
tools.description: Create a simple OTIO-compatible rough-cut plan from a source media file and brief.

tools.name: premiere.measure_loudness
tools.description: Run pyloudnorm when available, otherwise write a loudness adapter manifest.

tools.name: premiere.measure_vmaf
tools.description: Run FFmpeg libvmaf against a reference file, or write an adapter report when libvmaf is unavailable.

tools.name: premiere.mix_audio
tools.description: Create an audio mix plan with loudness targets for external adapters.

tools.name: premiere.move_clip
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to move a clip in time or to another track.

tools.name: premiere.overwrite_clip_at_time
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to overwrite media at a timeline time.

tools.name: premiere.read_cep_status
tools.description: Read Premiere CEP status JSON files produced by the panel scaffold.

tools.name: premiere.render_preview_range
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to render timeline previews for a bounded range.

tools.name: premiere.replace_clip_media
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to replace the source media for a targeted clip.

tools.name: premiere.repurpose_podcast
tools.description: Create a podcast/video repurposing plan with speaker-aware clips and social variants.

tools.name: premiere.ripple_delete_with_approval
tools.description: Queue an approval-gated Premiere CEP command to ripple delete a targeted timeline clip.

tools.name: premiere.run_delivery_qc
tools.description: Write a standardized delivery QC report for an existing media file.

tools.name: premiere.set_audio_gain
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to set audio gain on a targeted clip.

tools.name: premiere.set_clip_speed
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to set clip playback speed.

tools.name: premiere.split_clip
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to split a clip at a timeline time.

tools.name: premiere.transcribe_media
tools.description: Run WhisperX when available, otherwise write a transcription adapter manifest.

tools.name: premiere.trim_clip
tools.description: Queue a typed Premiere CEP command to trim a clip without exposing raw ExtendScript.

tools.name: premiere.validate_subtitles
tools.description: Validate SRT/VTT cues for timing, overlap, empty text, and reading speed.

tools.name: premiere.watch_export_output
tools.description: Poll an export output path and run delivery QC once the file appears.

tools.name: provider.check_availability
tools.description: Inspect local availability and safety posture for registered creative app providers.

tools.name: provider.resolve_game_engine
tools.description: Resolve a safe game-engine provider for Roblox project QC and future Studio integration.

tools.name: provider.resolve_motion_engine
tools.description: Resolve a safe motion/render provider such as After Effects aerender/nexrender or Blender motion.

tools.name: provider.resolve_video_editor
tools.description: Resolve a safe video editor provider, preferring Premiere when available and CapCut for social fallback.

tools.name: provider.write_provider_report
tools.description: Write a combined provider strategy report for video, motion, and game workflows.

tools.name: roblox.check_availability
tools.description: Check Roblox Studio/Rojo/Wally/Selene/Stylua availability for read-only QC workflows.

tools.name: roblox.collect_playtest_report
tools.description: Write a Roblox playtest report from official Studio MCP or self-hosted runner evidence.

tools.name: roblox.collect_studio_evidence
tools.description: Write Roblox Studio read-only status evidence without claiming live Studio integration unless status evidence is readable.

tools.name: roblox.generate_project_report
tools.description: Generate combined Roblox project, script index, command manifest, and QC report artifacts.

tools.name: roblox.index_scripts
tools.description: Index Luau/Lua scripts in a Roblox project without executing them.

tools.name: roblox.inspect_place_tree
tools.description: Read a Rojo project file and write a normalized Roblox place-tree report.

tools.name: roblox.inspect_project
tools.description: Inspect a Roblox/Rojo project tree without mutating files.

tools.name: roblox.prepare_studio_mcp_session
tools.description: Write an official Roblox Studio MCP session plan and client config without connecting to Studio or proxying raw tools.

tools.name: roblox.prepare_studio_operation
tools.description: Write a bounded official Roblox Studio MCP operation plan for inspection, asset import, safe script edits, playtests, or log collection.

tools.name: roblox.prepare_weppy_provider
tools.description: Write a WEPPY optional external provider design and license review note without adding it to core execution.

tools.name: roblox.run_selene
tools.description: Write a Selene lint command manifest for Luau QC.

tools.name: roblox.run_stylua_check
tools.description: Write a StyLua check command manifest for Luau formatting QC.

tools.name: roblox.run_wally_install
tools.description: Write a Wally install command manifest; actual install requires explicit external execution.

tools.name: roblox.sync_rojo
tools.description: Write a safe Rojo sync command manifest without publishing or mutating Studio.

tools.name: roblox.validate_luau_project
tools.description: Write a Luau project QC report using local file inspection and command-manifest checks.

tools.name: video.create_edit
tools.description: Create a provider-aware edit package that prefers Premiere and writes a CapCut fallback draft when Premiere is unavailable.
